name: Strawberry Banana Split Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 4-ounce package French Vanilla or Vanilla instant pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the half-and-half and pureed strawberries into a large bowl.
2. Add the pudding mix to the bowl.
3. Beat with a wire whisk until well blended, 1 to 2 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
4. Line the bottom of the crust with banana slices.
5. Fold the cool whip into the pudding mixture and spoon it into the crust.
6. Freeze until firm, about 6 hours or overnight.
7. Remove from the freezer and let stand at room temperature for about 10 minutes before serving to soften.
8. Garnish with whipped topping, maraschino cherries, and chipped nuts. Serve with remaining strawberries pureed if desired.
